prompt: Single dramatic three-quarter view of a finished kitchen island in an Andover MA open-plan kitchen. Honed black soapstone counter top with a thick mitred waterfall edge. Walnut wood inset panel detail wraps the seating side. Three matte-black pendant lights hang in a precise row above. Two leather-bench bar stools tucked under one end. Shot with 50mm normal lens, cool overhead workshop fluorescent style ambient lighting (neutral, slightly clinical) layered with one warm tungsten pendant catching a copper kettle on the counter. The kettle is the only saturated color. High-contrast slightly desaturated palette, working-contractor catalog feel. NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury staged. Documentary trade photography. No readable text, no logos.
